# Copilot Instructions

Use `/workspaces/github-com-fairtracks-omnipy/AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository instructions.

Apply the repo-specific guidance there for:
- `uv` setup and command execution
- pytest commands and required mypy-plugin flags
- formatting and pre-commit behavior
- architecture entrypoints and test quirks

If these instructions and `AGENTS.md` diverge, follow `AGENTS.md` and sync this file.
